title: Ensuring access to state benefits and opportunities for veterans, uniformed service members, and military spouses.
summary: Ensuring access to state benefits and opportunities for veterans, uniformed service members, and military spouses.

actions.action: First reading, referred to Technology, Economic Development, & Veterans.
Public hearing in the House Committee on Technology, Economic Development, & Veterans at 8:00 AM.
Executive action taken in the House Committee on Technology, Economic Development, & Veterans at 10:30 AM.
TEDV - Majority; 1st substitute bill be substituted, do pass.
By resolution, reintroduced and retained in present status.

votes.description: House Committee on Technology, Economic Development, & Veterans: 1st substitute bill be substituted, do pass
